mapper.sql: C.ID AS id, C.SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID AS socialAccountId, C.GUEST_TOKEN_ID AS guestTokenId, C.PRODUCT_DET_ID AS productDetId, C.QUANTITY AS quantity, C.UNIT_PRICE AS unitPrice, C.CURRENCY AS currency, C.STATUS AS status, C.DEL_YN AS delYn, C.CRE_TM AS creTm, C.UPT_TM AS uptTm, P.ID AS productId, P.PROD_NM AS productName, FD.SYS_FILE_NM AS productImage, PD.PRODUCT_DET_SIZE AS productDetSize, PD.PRODUCT_DET_COLOR AS productDetColor, PD.SKU_DISCOUNT_RATE AS skuDiscountRate
FROM TB_CART C JOIN TB_PRODUCT_DET PD ON PD.ID = C.PRODUCT_DET_ID JOIN TB_PRODUCT P ON P.ID = PD.PRODUCT_ID JOIN TB_FILE_DET FD ON FD.FILE_ID = P.REP_FILE_ID AND FD.FILE_SEQ = 1
mapper.insert: /* Cart.insertCart */ INSERT INTO TB_CART ( SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID, GUEST_TOKEN_ID, PRODUCT_DET_ID, QUANTITY, UNIT_PRICE, CURRENCY, STATUS, DEL_YN, CRE_TM, UPT_TM ) VALUES ( #{socialAccountId}, #{guestTokenId}, #{productDetId}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, COALESCE(#{currency}, 'KRW'), 'A', 'N', NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: /* Cart.markOrderedBySocialAccountId */ UPDATE TB_CART SET STATUS = 'O', DEL_YN = 'Y', UPT_TM = NOW() WHERE SOCIAL_ACCOUNT_ID = #{socialAccountId} AND DEL_YN = 'N' AND STATUS = 'A'
